source_pr.title: expression: make the selection executor support vectorized expression evaluation
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
Make the selection executor support vectorized expression evaluation.

### What is changed and how it works?
Using filter conditions that implement the vectorized evaluation function as a parameter to the vecEvalBool function.

All the types gain some performance benefits, and here is the benchmark:
```
BenchmarkRowBasedFilterAndVectorizedFilter/Vec-int/-4             134923              8892 ns/op              64 B/op          2 allocs/op
BenchmarkRowBasedFilterAndVectorizedFilter/Row-int/-4             106368             11785 ns/op               0 B/op          0 allocs/op
BenchmarkRowBasedFilterAndVectorizedFilter/Vec-real/-4            116634              9682 ns/op              64 B/op          2 allocs/op
BenchmarkRowBasedFilterAndVectorizedFilter/Row-real/-4             27681             42377 ns/op               0 B/op          0 allocs/op
BenchmarkRowBasedFilterAndVectorizedFilter/Vec-decimal/-4           3194            401937 ns/op           61807 B/op       1974 allocs/op
BenchmarkRowBasedFilterAndVectorizedFilter/Row-decimal/-4           2876            440534 ns/op           61712 B/op       1972 allocs/op
BenchmarkRowBasedFilterAndVectorizedFilter/Vec-string/-4           22010             55648 ns/op              64 B/op          2 allocs/op
BenchmarkRowBasedFilterAndVectorizedFilter/Row-string/-4           14310             78311 ns/op               0 B/op          0 allocs/op
BenchmarkRowBasedFilterAndVectorizedFilter/Vec-datetime/-4         46197             25607 ns/op              64 B/op          2 allocs/op
BenchmarkRowBasedFilterAndVectorizedFilter/Row-datetime/-4          9694            111008 ns/op           31040 B/op        970 allocs/op
BenchmarkRowBasedFilterAndVectorizedFilter/Vec-timestamp/-4        46048             25711 ns/op              64 B/op          2 allocs/op
BenchmarkRowBasedFilterAndVectorizedFilter/Row-timestamp/-4        10000            110404 ns/op           31360 B/op        980 allocs/op
BenchmarkRowBasedFilterAndVectorizedFilter/Vec-duration/-4        133914              8702 ns/op              64 B/op          2 allocs/op
BenchmarkRowBasedFilterAndVectorizedFilter/Row-duration/-4         30522             40181 ns/op               0 B/op          0 allocs/op
BenchmarkRowBasedFilterAndVectorizedFilter/Vec-special_case-4      75487             14114 ns/op              64 B/op          2 allocs/op
BenchmarkRowBasedFilterAndVectorizedFilter/Row-special_case-4      39448             31301 ns/op               0 B/op          0 allocs/op
```

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to timing-sensitive asynchronous behavior (background tasks/events not fully settled). This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: files: expression/bench_test.go, expression/chunk_executor.go, expression/expression.go, go.mod, tools/check/go.mod, types/datum_test.go, util/chunk/chunk.go, util/chunk/column.go, util/chunk/iterator.go
